examples: The buildings all line up neatly

meanings.definition: get something or somebody for a specific purpose
examples: I found this gadget that will serve as a bottle opener
I got hold of these tools to fix our plumbing
The chairman got hold of a secretary on Friday night to type the urgent letter

meanings.definition: form a queue, form a line, stand in line
examples: Customers lined up in front of the store

meanings.definition: place in a line or arrange so as to be parallel or straight
examples: align the car with the curb
align the sheets of paper on the table

meanings.definition: take one's position before a kick-off
